text:
10th bhava : 8th lord in the 10th bhava, creates trouble in service, business, problems with health,
death of elderly persons.
11th bhava : 8th lord in the 11th bhava, loss from friends and travels.
12th bhava : 8th lord in the 12th bhava, if afflicted loss in service and business. Not a good period
for enterprise and business. If Saturn is afflicted in 12th house then fall from position, loss of
service etc.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
45

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Results of 9th lord in various bhavas of the paribhraman chart
1st bhava : Turn in bhava for better, association with people of higher learning, success in ……..
get honors abroad, good for trade, is blessed with children.
